evals.name: search-screws
evals.prompt: 我想找螺絲，櫃子裡在哪裡有螺絲？請顯示清單介面。
evals.expected_output: Agent triggers the locker-search skill, runs data extraction, and presents an HTML interface with '螺絲' results.

evals.name: search-m3-spec
evals.prompt: 電子儲物櫃裡面有 M3 規格的零件嗎？分別在哪個位置？
evals.expected_output: Agent triggers the locker-search skill and generates an interface filtering for 'M3'.
